experiences.intentions: Active J is high and unobstructed, currently around columns 3-5. Surface below is uneven with a left-side cavity around columns 2-3 above the L structure and a broader right-side stack. Goal now is to improve board flatness without creating overhangs, while preserving options for upcoming O and I pieces. Immediate drops in the current orientation near the left can tuck the J to fill the notch above the L blocks better than rotating now. Among candidates, moving left advances toward that placement; hard/soft drop now would commit too early in a less evaluated column, and rotation is unnecessary because the spawn orientation already suits a left tuck.
